artistContext.name: Seth Troxler
artistContext.summary: As a comparable youth on the scene, Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene. Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With much-hyped and played releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive sexy techno sound.

writer.title: Seth Troxler: A Young Voice in Detroit Techno
writer.subtitle: Berlin-based artist earns elite status with distinctive minimal techno sound.
writer.author: A. Stern
writer.excerpt: Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive techno sound.

His recent releases include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.
Seth Troxler's sound is firmly rooted in techno, minimal, and minimal techno genres, with clear connections to the Detroit techno tradition.
